parameters: I guess we're most the way there, then.
I'd say it's time to celebrate.
\nr<Sayu>We’ve still got to get past the border.
\nr<Lisnia>I’ll just talk to them! Hold on...
\nr<Lisnia>But that girl got through and stuff!
\nr<Sayu>My name is Sayu. And I took a boat.
\nr<Sayu>I gave it to a friend of mine, a sailor.
\nr<Sayu>He used to take me and my brother
on trips from time to time.
go north of Learin, you just have to...\.\^
we are only here for discussion!
sounds like some crappy excuse to me!
They’ve been sent by my Father.
\nr<Lanissa>They are here to negotiate the potential
war between your nation and Learin.
\nr<Dasras>Why would we let you meet the princess?
\nr<Zanta>Your highness! Do you know these people?
\nr<Aneca>Guards, lead us to the meeting room.
